title: 11292_Learning_Time-Varying_Multi-Region_Brain_Communications_via_Scalable_Markovian_Gaussian_Processes
positive_examples: Enhances ability to analyze large-scale neural recordings
Offers insights into sensory processing, cognitive flexibility, and neural disorders
